---
title: "Hardware Support"
---

# Hardware Support

The framework provides a common interface for laboratory hardware.

## Cameras

- Andor Neo
- IDS Event Camera

## Microwave Sources

- Stanford Research Systems SG384

## Pulse Generators

- Swabian Pulse Streamer

## Motion Control

- SmarAct XYZ Stages

## Power Supplies

- Keysight E3631A
- Keysight E36234A

## Planned Support

- Quantum Machines OPX
- Additional scientific cameras
